"G:\CLion 2025.2.3\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test_volta.dir/objects.a
G:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test_volta.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test_volta.dir\objects1.rsp
G:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_volta.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o test_volta.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_volta.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_volta.dir\linkLibs.rsp
